script_full = textwrap.dedent(r"""
---
title: "Pygo_gene_enrichment (FINAL)"
author: "Galen O'Shea-Stone"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

##############################################################################
## Transcriptomics → GO / KEGG → Reactome enrichment (Gallus gallus)        ##
## + diagnostics, Excel export, and polished visualisations                 ##
##############################################################################

## 0.  CONFIGURATION  =========================================================
input_file   <- "pygo_MAIN.csv"   # ← your differential‐expression table
species_name <- "chicken"         # ReactomePA shorthand for Gallus gallus
kegg_code    <- "gga"             # KEGG organism code
padj_cutoff  <- 0.05              # significance threshold
logFC_cutoff <- 1                 # minimum |log2FC| to retain
topN         <- 300               # keep top N up + N down genes (optional)

## 1.  INSTALL & LOAD PACKAGES  ----------------------------------------------
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

cran_extras <- c("UpSetR", "EnhancedVolcano")
need_cran   <- cran_extras[!sapply(cran_extras, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(need_cran)) install.packages(need_cran, dependencies = TRUE)

bio_pkgs <- c("clusterProfiler","ReactomePA","pathview","biomaRt",
              "AnnotationDbi","dplyr","ggplot2","openxlsx",
              "ComplexHeatmap","circlize","enrichplot")
need_bio <- bio_pkgs[!sapply(bio_pkgs, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(need_bio)) BiocManager::install(need_bio, update = FALSE, ask = FALSE)

if (!requireNamespace("org.Gg.eg.db", quietly = TRUE))
  BiocManager::install("org.Gg.eg.db", update = FALSE, ask = FALSE)

# load libraries -------------------------------------------------------------
library(clusterProfiler)
library(ReactomePA)
library(pathview)
library(biomaRt)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(openxlsx)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(UpSetR)
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(enrichplot)
library(org.Gg.eg.db)
orgDb <- org.Gg.eg.db

dir.create("output", showWarnings = FALSE)

## 2.  READ & PREP DATA  ------------------------------------------------------
tbl <- read.csv(input_file, check.names = FALSE) |>
        rename(gene = 1, logFC = 2, padj = 3)

# map symbols → Entrez
gene2entrez <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  orgDb, keys = tbl$gene, columns = "ENTREZID", keytype = "SYMBOL"
)

tbl <- left_join(tbl, gene2entrez, by = c("gene" = "SYMBOL")) |>
       filter(!is.na(ENTREZID))

gene_universe <- tbl$ENTREZID |> as.character()

tbl_sig <- tbl |>
           filter(padj < padj_cutoff, abs(logFC) >= logFC_cutoff) |>
           arrange(desc(logFC))

if (!is.null(topN) && nrow(tbl_sig) > 2*topN) {
  tbl_sig <- bind_rows(
    head(tbl_sig,  topN),          # top up-regulated
    tail(tbl_sig,  topN)           # top down-regulated
  )
}

sig_genes <- unique(tbl_sig$ENTREZID) |> as.character()

cat(sprintf(
  "\nUniverse: %d genes | Test set: %d genes (%.1f%% of universe)\n",
  length(unique(gene_universe)),
  length(sig_genes),
  100*length(sig_genes)/length(unique(gene_universe))
))

## 3.  ENRICHMENT ANALYSES  ---------------------------------------------------
ego <- enrichGO(gene = sig_genes, universe = gene_universe,
                OrgDb = orgDb, ont = "BP", pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                readable = TRUE)

ekegg <- enrichKEGG(gene = sig_genes, universe = gene_universe,
                    organism = kegg_code, keyType = "ncbi-geneid",
                    pAdjustMethod = "BH")
if (!is.null(ekegg) && nrow(as.data.frame(ekegg)) > 0)
  ekegg <- setReadable(ekegg, orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID")

ereact <- enrichPathway(gene = sig_genes, universe = gene_universe,
                        organism = species_name, pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                        readable = TRUE)

# preranked GSEA -------------------------------------------------------------
ranks <- tbl |> arrange(desc(logFC)) |>
         transmute(ENTREZID, rnk = logFC) |> tibble::deframe()

gsea_go <- gseGO(geneList = ranks, OrgDb = orgDb, ont = "BP",
                 pAdjustMethod = "BH")
if (!is.null(gsea_go) && nrow(as.data.frame(gsea_go)) > 0)
  gsea_go <- setReadable(gsea_go, orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID")

## 4.  EXPORT TABLES  ---------------------------------------------------------
as_df <- function(res, id_col = "geneID") {
  if (is.null(res) || nrow(as.data.frame(res)) == 0) return(data.frame())
  as.data.frame(res) |> rename(Genes = !!id_col)
}

write.xlsx(
  list(GO_ORA   = as_df(ego, "geneID"),
       KEGG_ORA = as_df(ekegg, "geneID"),
       Reactome = as_df(ereact, "geneID"),
       GO_GSEA  = as_df(gsea_go, "core_enrichment")),
  file      = "output/enrichment_results_with_genes.xlsx",
  overwrite = TRUE
)

## 5.  PLOTTING HELPERS  ------------------------------------------------------
save_plot <- function(plot, filename, w = 7, h = 5) {
  ggsave(file.path("output", filename), plot = plot,
         width = w, height = h, units = "in")
}

make_dot <- function(res, stub, title, n_cat = 15) {
  if (is.null(res) || nrow(as.data.frame(res)) == 0) return(invisible())
  p <- dotplot(res, showCategory = n_cat) + ggtitle(title)
  save_plot(p, sprintf("dotplot_%s.pdf", stub))
}

## 6.  VISUALISATIONS  --------------------------------------------------------

# 6a. Volcano ---------------------------------------------------------------
p_volc <- EnhancedVolcano(tbl,
  lab       = tbl$gene,
  x         = "logFC",
  y         = "padj",
  xlab      = bquote(~Log[2]~" fold change"),
  pCutoff   = padj_cutoff,
  FCcutoff  = logFC_cutoff,
  selectLab = tbl_sig$gene,
  pointSize = 2, labSize = 3)
save_plot(p_volc, "volcano_plot.pdf", w = 7, h = 6)

# 6b. Barplot of |logFC| bins (base R) --------------------------------------
pdf("output/logFC_bins_barplot.pdf", width = 6, height = 4)
barplot(table(cut(abs(tbl$logFC),
                  breaks = c(0,1,2,4,8,Inf),
                  labels = c("<1","1‑2","2‑4","4‑8",">8"))),
        main = "Distribution of |log2FC|", ylab = "Gene count",
        xlab = "|log2FC| bins")
dev.off()

# 6c. UpSet of enriched terms ----------------------------------------------
if (nrow(as_df(ego)) || nrow(as_df(ekegg)) || nrow(as_df(ereact))) {
  term_lists <- list()
  if (nrow(as_df(ego)))   term_lists$GO_BP   <- as_df(ego)$Description
  if (nrow(as_df(ekegg))) term_lists$KEGG    <- as_df(ekegg)$Description
  if (nrow(as_df(ereact)))term_lists$Reactome<- as_df(ereact)$Description

  pdf("output/upset_enrichment_terms.pdf", width = 7, height = 5)
  UpSetR::upset(fromList(term_lists), order.by = "freq",
                mainbar.y.label = "Shared terms",
                sets.x.label    = "Term count")
  dev.off()
}

# 6d. Cnetplot --------------------------------------------------------------
if (nrow(as_df(ego))) {
  p_cnet <- cnetplot(ego, showCategory = 10, node_label = "all")
  save_plot(p_cnet, "cnetplot_GO_ORA.pdf", w = 9, h = 8)
}

# 6e. Dotplots --------------------------------------------------------------
make_dot(ego,      "GO_ORA",      "GO BP ORA")
make_dot(ekegg,    "KEGG_ORA",    "KEGG ORA")
make_dot(ereact,   "Reactome_ORA","Reactome ORA")
make_dot(gsea_go,  "GO_GSEA",     "GO GSEA (preranked)")

## 7.  OPTIONAL: KEGG PATHVIEW  ----------------------------------------------
if (nrow(as_df(ekegg))) {
  pathview(gene.data  = setNames(tbl$logFC, tbl$ENTREZID),
           pathway.id = ekegg$ID[1], species = kegg_code,
           out.suffix = "logFC", kegg.native = TRUE)
}

cat("\n✓ All done!  See the 'output/' folder for Excel + plots.\n")


```
